message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam databaseStyle cylinder
skinparam databaseBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam databaseBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteFontName Arial
skinparam noteTextAlignment center
skinparam notePadding 5
skinparam noteMargin 5
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteBorderRadius 5
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteTransparency 0.8
skinparam noteOpacity 0.8
skinparam noteZIndex 100
skinparam noteLayer 100
skinparam notePosition top
skinparam noteAlignment center
skinparam noteDirection horizontal
skinparam noteOrientation horizontal
skinparam noteRotation 0
skinparam noteScale 1
skinparam noteWidth 100
skinparam noteHeight 50
skinparam noteMinWidth 50
skinparam noteMinHeight 25
skinparam noteMaxWidth 200
skinparam noteMaxHeight 100
skinparam noteWrap true
skinparam noteEllipsis true
skinparam noteTruncate true
skinparam noteOverflow hidden
skinparam noteTextOverflow ellipsis
skinparam noteTextWrap wrap
skinparam noteTextAlign center
skinparam noteTextVAlign middle
skinparam noteTextHAlign center
skinparam noteTextJustify false
skinparam noteTextIndent 0
skinparam noteTextSpacing 0
skinparam noteTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam noteTextLetterSpacing 0
skinparam noteTextWordSpacing 0
skinparam noteTextDecoration none
skinparam noteTextTransform none
skinparam noteTextShadow none
skinparam noteTextOutline none
skinparam noteTextStroke none
skinparam noteTextFill none
skinparam noteTextBackground none
skinparam noteTextBorder none
skinparam noteTextPadding 0
skinparam noteTextMargin 0
skinparam noteTextBorderRadius 0
skinparam noteTextBorderWidth 0
skinparam noteTextBorderStyle solid
skinparam noteTextBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteTextBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam noteTextColor #000000
skinparam noteTextFontFamily Arial
skinparam noteTextFontSize 12
skinparam noteTextFontWeight normal
skinparam noteTextFontStyle normal
skinparam noteTextFontVariant normal
skinparam noteTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam noteTextLetterSpacing 0
skinparam noteTextWordSpacing 0
skinparam noteTextDecoration none
skinparam noteTextTransform none
skinparam noteTextShadow none
skinparam noteTextOutline none
skinparam noteTextStroke none
skinparam noteTextFill none
skinparam noteTextBackground none
skinparam noteTextBorder none
skinparam noteTextPadding 0
skinparam noteTextMargin 0
skinparam noteTextBorderRadius 0
skinparam noteTextBorderWidth 0
skinparam noteTextBorderStyle solid
skinparam noteTextBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteTextBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam noteTextColor #000000
skinparam noteTextFontFamily Arial
skinparam noteTextFontSize 12
skinparam noteTextFontWeight normal
skinparam noteTextFontStyle normal
skinparam noteTextFontVariant normal

title カレンダー表示機能

actor "ユーザー" as User
participant "カレンダー表示機能" as CalendarDisplay
database "画像DB" as ImageDB

== 画像取得 from Locix ==

User -> CalendarDisplay: カレンダー表示
activate CalendarDisplay

box "画像取得" #LightGray
CalendarDisplay -> ImageDB: 日付単位で画像取得
activate ImageDB
ImageDB --> CalendarDisplay: レスポンス
deactivate ImageDB
end box

box "カレンダー表示" #LightGray
alt [画像取得中]
    CalendarDisplay --> User: ローディングインジケーター表示
else [画像取得完了]
    CalendarDisplay --> User: カレンダーを表示
end alt
deactivate CalendarDisplay
end box

== 一覧表示 ==

User -> CalendarDisplay: 撮影日付選択
activate CalendarDisplay
CalendarDisplay --> User: 画像一覧を撮影時間の降順で表示
deactivate CalendarDisplay

@enduml
